zh.lifeSummary: 當Loretta De Furnival於1260年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾伯頓 拉梅時，她的父親Gerard de Furnival26歲，母親Isabel24歲。她於1287年與John Ufflete在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1340年之後。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Furnival
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Fourneville (Calvados), Fournival in Saint-Just-en-Chaussée (Oise), or Fournival in Saint-Julien-sur-Sarthe (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Loretta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Lauretta  , normally borne by Roman Catholics, among whom it is associated with   Loreto .

variants.name: Lauretta
meanings: diminutive form of   Laura  , also sometimes used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Loretta De Furnival was born in 1260, in Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Gerard de Furnival, was 26 and her mother, Isabel, was 24. She married John Ufflete in 1287, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1340.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Loretta De Furnival est née en 1260, à Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gerard de Furnival, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Ufflete en 1287, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1340.

de.lifeSummary: Als Loretta De Furnival 1260 in Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerard de Furnival 26 und ihre Mutter Isabel 24. Sie hat 1287 in England John Ufflete geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1340.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Loretta De Furnival è nata il nel 1260 nel Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gerard de Furnival, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Isabel, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Ufflete nel 1287, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1340.

ja.lifeSummary: Loretta De Furnivalが1260年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブルトン ラティマーで生まれた時，父Gerard de Furnivalは26歳，母Isabelは24歳であった。1287年にイギリスでJohn Uffleteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1340年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Loretta De Furnival(이)가 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 버턴 레이팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerard de Furnival(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1287년 영국에서 John Ufflete(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1340년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Loretta De Furnival nasceu em 1260, em Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gerard de Furnival, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel, tinha 24 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Loretta De Furnival родилась в 1260 г. в местности буртон латимир, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gerard de Furnival было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Ufflete в 1287 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1340 г.
